stemHtml: A large jet transport aeroplane is cruising at the Long Range Cruise speed (LRC). A deviation of +/- 1000 ft from the LRC optimum altitude leads to 2.5% change in specific range. The specific range will change by (1) _____ if flying 1000 ft above the optimum altitude, and by (2) _____ if flying 2000 ft below the optimum altitude.
